description: The Nation of Iran Party (Hezb-e Mellat-e Iran) is one of the oldest nationalist-democratic political parties in Iran, founded in 1951 during the oil nationalisation movement. Led for decades by [Dariush Forouhar](/people/dariush-forouhar), it advocated for secular democracy, free elections, and the rule of law. Forouhar and his wife [Parvaneh Forouhar](/people/parvaneh-forouhar) were assassinated in their home on 22 November 1998 as part of the [chain murders](/events/chain-murders-iran-1998). The party has been effectively banned since the early Islamic Republic but maintained an informal presence through the Forouhars' political salon.
editorial_notes: Founded 1951. Pan-Iranist/nationalist-democratic. Led by Dariush Forouhar until his assassination 1998. Effectively banned under Islamic Republic.
